title: Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas, Trilegal act on Brookfield India REIT ₹2,600 crore QIP
description: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust has raised ₹2,600 crore from a qualified institution placement (QIP) of 80,495,356 units.Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas & Co advised Brookfield on this QIP.The transaction team consisted of Nikhil Naredi (Partner), with support from Harini J (Senior Associate), Associates Mathangi K, Anaya Jain and Abhit Tanay. Jay Gandhi (Partner) provided strategic inputs on the transaction.Nikhil NarediTrilegal advised the book running lead man
